ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number assigned to the path */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the track */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., research, monitoring) */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., sensor, manual) */,
  "track_status" TEXT /* Status of the track (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the track started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the track ended */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel or station associated with the track */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher responsible for the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the track record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_vessel_id FOREIGN KEY ("vessel_id") REFERENCES vessels ("vessel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track to which the data point belongs */,
  "time_seconds" INTEGER /* Time in seconds since the start of the track */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the data point */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the data point */,
  "sog" REAL /* Speed over ground (SOG) of the vessel */,
  "oceanic_depth" REAL /* Oceanic depth at the data point */,
  "chlorophyll_concentration" REAL /* Chlorophyll concentration at the data point */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity at the data point */,
  "water_surface_elevation" REAL /* Water surface elevation at the data point */,
  "sea_temperature" REAL /* Sea temperature at the data point */,
  "thermocline_depth" REAL /* Thermocline depth at the data point */,
  "eastward_water_velocity" REAL /* Eastward water velocity at the data point */,
  "northward_water_velocity" REAL /* Northward water velocity at the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality indicator for the data point (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor used to collect the data */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting this specific data point */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the data point for versioning purposes */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vessels" (
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vessel */,
  "vessel_name" TEXT /* Name of the vessel */,
  "vessel_type" TEXT /* Type of the vessel (e.g., research vessel, monitoring station) */,
  "home_port" TEXT /* Home port of the vessel */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the vessel */,
  "vessel_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vessel (e.g., number of researchers it can accommodate) */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the vessel (e.g., active, under maintenance) */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Registration number of the vessel */,
  "commission_date" TEXT /* Date when the vessel was commissioned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vessel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "research_focus" TEXT /* Primary research focus area (e.g., marine biology, oceanography) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date when the researcher joined the organization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)
